name: Relative Path Traversal
description: The product uses external input to construct a pathname that should be within a restricted directory, but does not properly neutralize '../' sequences that can resolve to a location outside of that directory.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '../' sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_system] operations (open, read, write, include) without passing through a CONTROL node that canonicalizes the path and validates it remains within the intended restricted directory
